name: GARAGE guy
description: Garage mechanic aesthetic — gritty industrial setting, grease and grit meets fashion.
asset_requirements: Upload your outfit front, brand logo, and back. All on clean backgrounds.

input_manifest.label: Front Top + Bottoms
input_manifest.hint: Front view of the full outfit — top and bottoms together on a clean background.

input_manifest.label: Logo
input_manifest.hint: Your brand logo. Will be subtly incorporated into the scene.

input_manifest.label: Back Outfit
input_manifest.hint: Back view of the outfit for back-of-jacket or full-look detail.

steps.prompt: Streetwear garage editorial. A model wearing the full outfit (front and back shown) stands in a gritty urban garage or workshop. The brand logo visible in the environment. Raw cinematic lighting, concrete floors, car parts, industrial energy. The outfit is the hero — clothing shown in full detail. Think Supreme x mechanic shop aesthetic.

Garage fashion video. Person in the clothing product moves through a gritty auto garage, leans against a car or picks up a tool, the clothing contrasts with the industrial environment, camera moves slowly around the subject, the clothing fabric and details shown clearly.
